summary: A Michigan woman has filed a civil negligence lawsuit in Sarasota County against a security guard and his firm, alleging they ignored signs of distress before her father was found dead inside his apartment.

title: Hillsborough school board considers turning former McLane Middle School campus into workforce housing
summary: District leaders are considering turning part of the former McLane Middle School campus into workforce housing to help Brandon school employees find affordable homes.

title: Soaring utility costs impact Tampa residents during peak summer heat: 'I was shocked'
summary: Tampa residents say their monthly electric bills have doubled or tripled as the summer heat forces air conditioners to work overtime.

title: Collisions in space are a growing concern. A plan to address it is reigniting a turf war
summary: The FCC unanimously adopted new space traffic rules requiring real-time satellite tracking — but a congressional debate over whether the agency has authority to regulate space safety is far from over.

title: Pinellas Park homeowners could see drop in flood insurance cost
summary: The City of Pinellas Park was just classified as Class 5 for FEMA's National Flood Insurance Premium Community Rating System.

title: House Republicans pass $95B budget to fund Iran war, Trump priorities
summary: The House adopted a Republican-only $95 billion budget proposal Wednesday, a long-shot effort to fund the Iran war and other White House priorities.

title: How arsonists used cats to spread Italy’s wildfires
summary: As wildfires blazed in southern Italy this week, authorities probing for arson found a grisly clue: cats “with flammable-soaked rags tied to their tails.”

title: Tampa airport joins TSA's new private screening program raising concerns from workers' union
summary: Tampa International Airport has opted into TSA Gold+, a new public-private partnership that will replace federal Transportation Security Administration workers with a private contractor workforce.

title: US signs new deal to develop civilian nuclear energy for Saudi Arabia
summary: The U.S. and Saudi Arabia have signed a new agreement that will give Saudi Arabia access to nuclear enrichment to support a civilian nuclear power program.

title: New report details just how much a new car will cost you and the reasons why
summary: New car prices are approaching $50,000 on average. Here's what's driving costs up and what buyers can do about it. 🚗
